<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Oráculo del Corazón — Encuentra tu destino</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;1,500&family=Italiana&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root{
    --bg-deep: #1a0f1f;
    --bg-mid: #2e1638;
    --panel: rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
    --border: rgba(212,175,140,0.35);
    --gold: #d4af8c;
    --gold-bright: #f0d9b5;
    --text: #f3ece7;
    --muted: #b6a4b0;
  }
  *{box-sizing:border-box;}
  html,body{
    margin:0;
    min-height:100%;
    background:
      radial-gradient(circle at 20% 15%, rgba(139,60,110,0.35), transparent 45%),
      radial-gradient(circle at 80% 85%, rgba(90,40,120,0.35), transparent 50%),
      linear-gradient(160deg, var(--bg-deep), var(--bg-mid));
    color:var(--text);
    font-family:'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif;
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    justify-content:center;
    overflow:hidden;
    position:relative;
  }

  /* estrellas de fondo */
  .stars{
    position:fixed; inset:0;
    background-image:
      radial-gradient(1px 1px at 10% 20%, rgba(255,255,255,0.6), transparent),
      radial-gradient(1px 1px at 80% 10%, rgba(255,255,255,0.5), transparent),
      radial-gradient(1.5px 1.5px at 60% 70%, rgba(255,255,255,0.5), transparent),
      radial-gradient(1px 1px at 30% 80%, rgba(255,255,255,0.4), transparent),
      radial-gradient(1.5px 1.5px at 90% 60%, rgba(255,255,255,0.5), transparent),
      radial-gradient(1px 1px at 45% 35%, rgba(255,255,255,0.4), transparent);
    background-repeat:no-repeat;
    opacity:0.8;
    pointer-events:none;
  }

  .card{
    position:relative;
    width:min(440px, 90vw);
    padding:52px 40px 44px;
    text-align:center;
    background:var(--panel);
    border:1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius:2px;
    backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
    box-shadow: 0 30px 80px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
  }
  .card::before, .card::after{
    content:'';
    position:absolute;
    width:34px; height:34px;
    border:1px solid var(--gold);
    opacity:0.6;
  }
  .card::before{ top:14px; left:14px; border-right:none; border-bottom:none; }
  .card::after{ bottom:14px; right:14px; border-left:none; border-top:none; }

  .glyph{
    font-size:26px;
    color:var(--gold-bright);
    margin-bottom:14px;
    letter-spacing:6px;
  }
  .eyebrow{
    font-family:'Italiana', serif;
    font-size:11px;
    letter-spacing:4px;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--gold);
    margin-bottom:16px;
  }
  h1{
    font-family:'Italiana', serif;
    font-weight:400;
    font-size:28px;
    line-height:1.3;
    margin:0 0 14px;
    color:var(--gold-bright);
  }
  p.sub{
    color:var(--muted);
    font-size:16px;
    font-style:italic;
    line-height:1.6;
    margin:0 0 30px;
  }

  input{
    width:100%;
    padding:13px 16px;
    margin-bottom:20px;
    font-family:'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size:17px;
    text-align:center;
    color:var(--text);
    background:rgba(255,255,255,0.03);
    border:1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius:2px;
    outline:none;
    letter-spacing:0.5px;
  }
  input::placeholder{ color:var(--muted); opacity:0.7; }
  input:focus{ border-color: var(--gold-bright); }

  button{
    width:100%;
    padding:14px 20px;
    font-family:'Italiana', serif;
    font-size:14px;
    letter-spacing:3px;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--bg-deep);
    background: linear-gradient(120deg, var(--gold), var(--gold-bright));
    border:none;
    border-radius:2px;
    cursor:pointer;
    transition:transform .15s ease, box-shadow .15s ease, opacity .15s ease;
  }
  button:hover{
    transform:translateY(-1px);
    box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(212,175,140,0.35);
  }
  button:disabled{
    opacity:0.5;
    cursor:default;
    transform:none;
    box-shadow:none;
  }

  .status{
    margin-top:22px;
    min-height:20px;
    font-size:13px;
    letter-spacing:1px;
    color:var(--muted);
    font-style:italic;
  }

  .shake{ animation: shake 0.4s ease-in-out infinite; }
  @keyframes shake{
    0%,100%{ transform: translate(0,0) rotate(0deg); }
    25%{ transform: translate(2px,-2px) rotate(0.4deg); }
    50%{ transform: translate(-2px,2px) rotate(-0.4deg); }
    75%{ transform: translate(2px,2px) rotate(0.4deg); }
  }

  .reveal{
    display:none;
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="stars"></div>

<div class="card" id="card">
  <div class="glyph">✦ ✧ ✦</div>
  <div class="eyebrow">Oráculo del corazón</div>
  <h1 id="title">Descubre el nombre<br>del amor de tu vida</h1>
  <p class="sub" id="sub">Escribe tu nombre y deja que el destino hable.</p>

  <input type="text" id="nombre" placeholder="Tu nombre">
  <button id="btn" onclick="iniciar()">Iniciar</button>

  <div class="status" id="status"></div>
</div>

<audio id="miAudio" preload="auto" src="data:audio/mpeg;base64,"></audio>

<script>

function iniciar(){
  const btn = document.getElementById('btn');
  const card = document.getElementById('card');
  const title = document.getElementById('title');
  const sub = document.getElementById('sub');
  const status = document.getElementById('status');
  const input = document.getElementById('nombre');

  if(btn.disabled) return;
  btn.disabled = true;

  const nombre = input.value.trim() || 'viajero';
  status.textContent = 'Consultando las estrellas...';

  setTimeout(()=>{
    status.textContent = 'El destino está tejiendo su respuesta...';
  }, 900);

  setTimeout(()=>{
    // el "resultado" es en realidad la sorpresa
    title.innerHTML = '🚨 ALERTA 🚨';
    sub.textContent = 'jaja te la creíste';
    status.textContent = '';
    card.classList.add('shake');

    const audio = document.getElementById('miAudio');
    audio.currentTime = 0;
    audio.play();

    audio.onended = ()=>{
      btn.disabled = false;
      btn.textContent = 'Otra vez';
      card.classList.remove('shake');
    };

  }, 2200);
}
</script>

</body>
</html>
